headline.text: L2 PTL sensor failure stopped depositor for *2 hours* — cleared by 18:19 after sensor swap — and L3 box printer still down at window close.

per_plant_summary.L1: Sollich 3 ran all day with two quick clears: blower buildup at 21:15 (5-minute pause) and a water leak under cereal pallets fixed by 20:16. Shift 3 flagged material shortages for Monday — SRS and PRS pouches both short, will run into WIP boxes once flow-wrap stock runs out.
per_plant_summary.L2: ML2 lost 2 hours when the PTL expansion tank sensor failed at 16:06; maintenance replaced the sensor and restarted depositing by 18:19. ML3 had two brief stops for a chocolate-caked roller and a flow-wrap label jam, both cleared inside 10 minutes.
per_plant_summary.L3: ML1 cleared five quick stops across the day — C-6 belt sensors, misalignment, mold alarm, water test failures (flow-wrap adhesive gap), and a dirty mold pin — but the box printer has been down since 06:44 with maintenance still working at window close while the line accumulates displays.

notes.text: Changeover to 24Ct/case12 completed at 05:26; temper held steady at -0.2 after cold water and crystallization adjustments overnight.
Sollich 2 completed MMK run at 03:00, started FD 12g after changeover at 04:00; first shift short on manpower, shutting down for lunches today.
ML3 switched from finished goods to WIP at 20:42.

resolved.title: Chocolate buildup on blower
resolved.summary: Significant chocolate accumulation on blower required 5-minute production pause to clean during third shift.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 21:33 — William reported "Line is running again."

resolved.title: Jars delivery delay for Sollich 2
resolved.summary: Jars scheduled for 14:00 delivery didn't arrive; driver located and jars delivered by 15:11.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 15:11 — Kirk Nickel confirmed "Driver is just pulling up to L1 with the jars!"

resolved.title: Water leak under cereal pallets
resolved.summary: Leak from compression fitting behind Sollich 4 kitchen ingredients puddled under cereal stock; crew moved pallets and cleaned floor while maintenance tightened fittings.
resolved.resolution: Cleared by 20:16 — Caleb York tightened fittings and noted thread sealant on compression fittings caused mineral buildup.

resolved.title: PTL expansion tank sensor failure
resolved.summary: Depositor lost temper control when PTL expansion tank sensor faulted at 16:06, causing overflow and stopping chocolate feed for 2 hours while maintenance diagnosed and replaced sensor.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 18:19 — Brandon Lance confirmed sensor replaced, chocolate tempered, and "We are depositing again" at 18:12; depositor running by 18:18.

resolved.title: ML3 CIL roller chocolate buildup
resolved.summary: Heavy chocolate accumulation on roller forced 10-minute line stop for cleaning at start of first shift.

resolved.title: ML3 flow-wrap label jam
resolved.summary: Label feed issue stopped flow-wrapper for 10 minutes during second shift.

resolved.title: ML3 brief line stop
resolved.summary: Short unspecified stoppage during second shift, back running within 4 minutes.

resolved.title: ML2 piece weight adjustment
resolved.summary: QA requested weight correction during second shift; line held 30 minutes for adjustment and verification.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 20:26 — Marlenis Fernandez confirmed "The weight is good; it is as close as possible to the target."

resolved.title: Water test failures on flow-wrap
resolved.summary: Multiple water test failures traced to gaps in flow-wrap adhesive; new roll installed and three consecutive passes confirmed fix.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 16:23 after roll change — Daniel ran 3 more tests with no failures and continued periodic testing remainder of shift.

resolved.title: C-6 belt sensor malfunction
resolved.summary: Sensors WB102, WB130, and WB140 needed sensitivity adjustment after belt started malfunctioning during morning production.
resolved.resolution: Nathan Ruiz adjusted sensitivity on all three sensors by 08:40 — "keep C6 running smoothly."

resolved.title: Temper control adjustment after mixing water minimum
resolved.summary: Temper dropped below spec when mixing water reached minimum adjustment; team coordinated crystallization and precooling changes to stabilize.
resolved.resolution: Stabilized by 18:16 — Nathan Gevenois confirmed "Temper has been staying steady at -.2" after cold water and crystallization adjustments held.

resolved.title: C-6 belt misalignment
resolved.summary: Belt tracking pulled off-center during afternoon shift, requiring maintenance re-alignment.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 14:23 — "The C-6 band has already been adjusted and is functioning correctly."

resolved.title: Mold alarm tripped on depositor
resolved.summary: Depositor faulted mid-afternoon, requiring QA and maintenance inspection before restart.

resolved.title: C6 belt tracking off overnight
resolved.summary: Belt drifted during third shift, triggering production hold for maintenance adjustment.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 22:45 — "C6 Belt running correctly, MD belt running correctly."

resolved.title: Morcos tank temperature drop
resolved.summary: Temper tank temperature fell from 46°F to 43°F at shift start; maintenance intervened to restore target.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 02:22 — Raoul confirmed "The Morcos temper Return to normal."

resolved.title: Safety sensor fault on line stop
resolved.summary: Safety interlock triggered, halting line until maintenance reset.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 02:54 — "Was a safety sensor maintenance has reset it. Functioning normally."

resolved.title: Mold pin alarm at shift end
resolved.summary: Mold alarm triggered near end of third shift; QA, maintenance, and supervisor inspected before clearing.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 05:02 — Raoul reported "No issues found it was a dirty pin."

needs_attention.title: SRS pouches short for Monday production
needs_attention.summary: Item 40921 needs 55,890 for Monday Sollich 2 run; only 17,930 on hand and airfreight of 40,000 not arriving until 06/29-06/30, forcing WIP box packaging.
needs_attention.status: Curt Willis directed at 18:43 to run SRS in pouches until stock depletes, then switch to WIP boxes for balance of order.

needs_attention.title: PRS pouches short for Monday production
needs_attention.summary: Item 40892 needs 55,890 for Monday Sollich 2 wrapped product; only 7,460 available in L3, will require WIP box fallback.
needs_attention.status: Curt Willis confirmed at 18:43 PRS will run in pouches until depletion, then continue into WIP boxes.

needs_attention.title: Box printer malfunction
needs_attention.summary: Printer fault at start of first shift has maintenance working through window close; line continues running and accumulating displays that can't be boxed.
needs_attention.status: Maintenance still troubleshooting as of 07:03; Grey Boscan reports line running and accumulating displays while repair continues.

needs_attention.title: Black parking belt drifting south
needs_attention.summary: Belt in parking area continuously tracking to south side; maintenance engaged but no resolution confirmed.
needs_attention.status: Maintenance working on tracking adjustment as of 00:25; no follow-up confirming fix.
